title: This is just a thought but
display_title: This is just a thought but
wikitext:
[]: This is just a thought but...             Quote Post by cd603 » Fri Dec 17, 2010 7:14 pm has anyone considered that the reason Asuka says she's disgusted at the end of EoE is because Shinji is touching her boobs? Look very closely at the last part and it kinda looks like he placing his hand right on her knockers...

[]: Re: This is just a thought but...             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Fri Dec 17, 2010 7:44 pm cd603 wrote: has anyone considered that the reason Asuka says she's disgusted at the end of EoE is because Shinji is touching her boobs? Look very closely at the last part and it kinda looks like he placing his hand right on her knockers...

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Dec 17, 2010 8:10 pm I think what you're identifying is the very last cut of animation before the cut to black. I'm including that, as well as a preceding cut that shows Shinji's hand placement when he is strangling Asuka. It looks to me like his left hand is resting on her shoulder. As for his right hand... who knows? Doesn't look like his hand is on her breast to me.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Fri Dec 17, 2010 8:16 pm '*honk honk*' With that shot in mind any thoughts on what all that glittery.....stuff is on the horizon to the right of the frame? And whats that below Asuka's head? Her hair? A piece of clothing? A pillow?

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Fri Dec 17, 2010 8:19 pm Jayfive wrote: '*honk honk*' With that shot in mind any thoughts on what all that glittery.....stuff is on the horizon to the right of the frame?

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Fri Dec 17, 2010 8:21 pm Have you not seen a sunset on a lake or ocean before?

[]:             Quote Post by Dirty Mick » Fri Dec 17, 2010 8:37 pm Shinji honked Rei's boob while on her, I guess honking Asuka was inevitable.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Fri Dec 17, 2010 8:47 pm Jayfive wrote: And whats that below Asuka's head? Her hair? A piece of clothing? A pillow?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Dec 17, 2010 8:47 pm FWIW, Shinji's head actually lands on Asuka's breasts after the strangling/caress occurs.

[]:             Quote Post by ShadowGT » Fri Dec 17, 2010 10:58 pm Shinji you legend! He may be a socially awkward manic depressive teen but he is the master of the surprise/secret grope.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Fri Dec 17, 2010 11:01 pm He is truly the Don Juan of losers.

[]:             Quote Post by cd603 » Sat Dec 18, 2010 2:45 am well even if he isn't touching them, he's definately looking at them...or at least his head is facing that direction.

[]:             Quote Post by ShadowGT » Sat Dec 18, 2010 3:26 am Oh he definatly has his face in Asuka's supple latex wrapped twin peaks.........oh i think i need a tissue.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Dec 18, 2010 4:09 am From that position, her breasts will be between his forearms, and his chin will be nestling into her cleavage. I suspect the sparkles on the horizon are meant to be reflections of the moonlight off the water. Compare cuts 466 showing the position of the moon with respect to the arc of blood/souls/whatever and the start of 476 http://www.evacommentary.org/episode-m26/episode-m26-scene12.html -- the moon will be just off the top of the frame here right above the sparkles. It's like we are looking at this through telephoto, since the moon would actually have to be very low in the sky to get the glitter near the horizon like that.

[]:             Quote Post by Hawq » Sun Jan 09, 2011 6:04 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: FWIW, Shinji's head actually lands on Asuka's breasts after the strangling/caress occurs.

[]:             Quote Post by Animejunkie » Sun Jan 09, 2011 10:28 am ShadowGT wrote: Shinji you legend! He may be a socially awkward manic depressive teen but he is the master of the surprise/secret grope.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Wed Jan 12, 2011 9:03 pm Hawq wrote: The end of the world is no reason to not motorboat I guess

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Thu Jan 13, 2011 2:31 pm I think he's just crying into her chest like of people do when they're sad. He's probably so fucked up in the head he that he wouldn't care about stuff like sex for a while.

[]:             Quote Post by Hawq » Thu Jan 13, 2011 2:38 pm Trajan wrote: I think he's just crying into her chest like of people do when they're sad. He's probably so fucked up in the head he that he wouldn't care about stuff like sex for a while.

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Thu Jan 13, 2011 2:41 pm Obviously you've never encountered someone who's just gone through a traumatic experience. Shinji's "manliness" has nothing to do with it, enduring the ultimate mind screw of all time does.
